title: bank of france / ecb / france | Speech Neutral | François Villeroy de Galhau: Navigating an uncertain world -...
summary: Bank of France Governor François Villeroy de Galhau delivered an introductory portion of a speech at Sciences Po on April 2, 2026, discussing whether recent geopolitical events (war in the Middle East) might replicate the 2022 energy price shock. The available excerpt describes the start of 2026 monetary policy as being in a favorable "2+2" configuration (2% inflation, 2% interest rate). The Governor begins to address why we are not witnessing a repeat of 2022. Note: this is only the introductory portion (~398 words) of a 15-page speech; substantive policy arguments are not included in this excerpt.
